name: Broccoli-Cauliflower Soup
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook broccoli, cauliflower, and onion in the bouillon until tender.
2. Pour half the vegetables, along with half the bouillon, into a blender and blend until smooth. Remove the blended mixture from the pan.
3. Blend the remaining vegetable mixture, including the mace, in the blender. Return all of the blended mixture to the pan.
4. Mix 1/2 cup of milk (1/6 of the total) with cornstarch in a separate bowl. Stir this mixture into the vegetables in the pan.
5. Add the remaining milk, salt, and pepper, then cook until thick and hot, stirring occasionally.
6. Blend in the shredded Swiss cheese and stir until melted.
(71 calories per serving)
Makes 8 servings
